title: Success Comes To Cow Creek by Edward Taylor — Deep Poetry Lines
content:
I sit on the tracks,
a hundred feet from
earth, fifty from the
water. Gerald is
inching toward me
as grim, slow, and
determined as a
season, because he
meaning: "Success Comes To Cow Creek" by Edward Taylor is a deep and nature poem consisting of 55 lines. The poet explores themes of deep and nature through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "I sit on the tracks, a hundred feet from...", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Edward Taylor's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
